name: New Year Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup chopped green onions and tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a wok or large skillet over medium heat until crisp.
2. Add green onions, red pepper, and peas; stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add egg and scramble.
4. Stir in rice and cook until heated through, gently separating grains.
5. Add soy sauce; cook and stir until heated through.
6. Serve immediately.
Serves: 4
